name: io.github.xmpuspus/ph-civic-data-mcp
title: PH Civic Data
description: PH civic data + NASA POWER + Open-Meteo + MODIS NDVI + USGS + IBTrACS + World Bank. 17 tools.

environmentVariables.name: PAGASA_API_TOKEN
environmentVariables.description: Optional PAGASA TenDay API token. Without it, get_weather_forecast automatically falls back to Open-Meteo.
